title: aster linosyris var. armoricanus
intro: Aster linosyris var. armoricanus, also known as the Pyrenean or Alpine Aster, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Aster linosyris var. armoricanus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
